About • G+ • GitHub

I'm one amongst several other Computer Engineering graduates from India. Got my degree from Cochin University.

Daytime I make use of the dual monitors in Perleybrook Labs, At night I blog, hack, sleep.


P.S: I love Apple & Cocoa.
